articles.title: Michael Harris II homers, has 4 hits to help Braves outlast Red Sox 7-6
articles.description:
Jarren Duran, Rafaela Ceddanne and Isiah Kiner-Falefa homered for Boston, which has lost its last four.

The post Michael Harris II homers, has 4 hits to help Braves outlast Red Sox 7-6 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Braves defeated Red Sox 7-6 in a close game on May 26.
Jarren Duran, Rafaela Ceddanne, and Isiah Kiner-Falefa each hit home runs for Boston.
Red Sox have now lost four consecutive games, raising concerns among local fans.

articles.title: Former Stoughton cop accused of killing Sandra Birchmore denied bail pending trial
articles.description:
The judge who ordered the former officer detained described the evidence against him as “very strong, if not overwhelming.”

The post Former Stoughton cop accused of killing Sandra Birchmore denied bail pending trial appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Former Stoughton police officer denied bail for the murder of Sandra Birchmore.
Judge described evidence against the officer as 'very strong, if not overwhelming.'
Trial outcome may influence public trust in local law enforcement.

articles.title: Investigators say fatal Maine lumber mill fire was accidental and started in silo
articles.description:
The May 15 fire and explosion at Robbins Lumber in Searsmont killed 27-year-old Andrew Cross of the Morrill Volunteer Fire Department.

The post Investigators say fatal Maine lumber mill fire was accidental and started in silo appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Investigators confirmed the May 15 fire at Robbins Lumber was accidental, originating in a silo.
The incident resulted in the death of 27-year-old Andrew Cross from the Morrill Volunteer Fire Department.
This tragedy highlights safety concerns for local lumber mills and emergency responders in the region.

summary: Joe Mazzulla named NBA Coach of the Year for 2025-26 season.

This award boosts Boston Celtics' reputation and local sports pride.

articles.title: New Hampshire mother and son found dead in suspected murder-suicide
articles.description:
The mother and son were both found dead in their home, and the son appeared to have suffered a gunshot wound to the head, officials said.

The post New Hampshire mother and son found dead in suspected murder-suicide appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire mother and son found dead in suspected murder-suicide on May 26.
Son suffered a gunshot wound to the head, raising community concerns.
Incident may prompt discussions on mental health resources in nearby Boston.
